items.title: Pinecone Introduces Nexus Engine for Compiling Business Context into Structured Data for AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Pinecone Introduces Nexus Engine for Compiling Business Context into Structured Data for AI Agents. Now generally available, Pinecone Nexus is a "knowledge engine" for AI agents that transforms enterprise data into a structured layer agents

items.title: Version Controlled SQL Database Dolt Releases 2.0 with Automatic Storage Cleanup and Compression
items.summaryShort: Version Controlled SQL Database Dolt Releases 2.0 with Automatic Storage Cleanup and Compression. DoltHub has recently released Dolt 2.0, a major update to the open source version-controlled SQL database.

items.title: Presentation: From OTEL to SLMs: Distilling Frontier Model Behaviour from Production Telemetry
items.summaryShort: Presentation: From OTEL to SLMs: Distilling Frontier Model Behaviour from Production Telemetry. Ben O'Mahony discusses building custom AI-powered Language Server Protocols (LSPs) that go beyond standard rule-based checkers.

items.title: Cloud Native Infrastructure Emerges as the Foundation for Trustworthy Agentic AI
items.summaryShort: Cloud Native Infrastructure Emerges as the Foundation for Trustworthy Agentic AI. A new technical analysis published by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) argues that the future of agentic AI will be built not on entirely new infr

items.title: How Uber Builds Zone-Failure-Resilient OpenSearch Clusters
items.summaryShort: How Uber Builds Zone-Failure-Resilient OpenSearch Clusters. Uber explained how it keeps its OpenSearch deployments running during a zone outage.

items.title: Waymo says San Francisco service has resumed after one-hour pause
items.summaryShort: Waymo says San Francisco service has resumed after one-hour pause. This isn’t the first time power outages have caused issues for Waymo.

items.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
items.summaryShort: Kimi: Threat or menace?. Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."
